snippet.title: KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS Official Trailer
snippet.description:
KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS in cinemas worldwide with limited screenings from August 12. 
tickets now on sale at http://katseyewildheartsfilm.com/

Two-time GRAMMY®-nominated global girl group KATSEYE is coming to cinemas worldwide with a special theatrical release ahead of their third EP, WILD.

KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is a captivating journey into the group's bold new era while celebrating the fans who helped make it possible. Featuring never-before-seen footage, EYEKONS fan videos, and intimate interviews from the group members, the film explores the powerful bond between KATSEYE and their global fandom. A love letter to the EYEKONS who helped build this movement, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS reveals why this group's story is only just beginning.

From the intense pressure of Dream Academy to chart-topping viral success, audiences experience the highs, setbacks, sacrifices, and breakthrough moments that transformed KATSEYE on their path to global pop stardom. Praised by outlets including The New York Times, Vogue, Rolling Stone, and Billboard, KATSEYE has earned acclaim for their relentless dedication to their craft and electrifying live performances. As one of pop's most exciting emerging global acts, the group continues to solidify its place as a worldwide force.

From the same team that created Netflix’s POP STAR ACADEMY, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is produced by Interscope Films and Boardwalk Pictures, in partnership with HYBE X GEFFEN, and directed by Nadia Hallgren.

snippet.title: Carín León - Primera Cita (Video + Letra)
snippet.description:
🎶💫 ¡Muchas gracias por ver el video! espero que les haya gustado.❤️❤️

🔔 ¡No olvides suscribirte y activar las notificaciones para disfrutar cada video.

📌 Aquí te invitamos a ver el vídeo oficial :
https://youtu.be/jhMiIUb2GEA?si=2cRYJVkjMcF_HGkN

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━୨୧━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Carín León - Primera Cita (letra)
Carín León - Primera Cita (letra)
Carín León - Primera Cita (letra)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━୨୧━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

“Primera Cita” de Carín León es una balada romántica que captura la emoción de un amor que comienza a florecer desde el primer encuentro. La letra refleja la ilusión, los nervios y la esperanza de descubrir a una persona con la que todo parece encajar de manera natural, dando paso a una historia llena de posibilidades.

La canción transmite ternura, alegría y la magia de las primeras emociones, recordándonos que los grandes amores muchas veces empiezan con un simple momento compartido. Es perfecta para dedicar a esa persona que cambió la vida desde la primera mirada y convirtió una primera cita en el inicio de una hermosa historia 💖✨

snippet.title: El Tamagochi Escarlata (The Scarlet Tamagochi) - Official Trailer
snippet.description:
¡Un crimen ha ocurrido en la sala del 4B! Una compañera sufre el robo de un invaluable y preciado juguete: El Tamagochi Escarlata, por lo que Iñaki y su amigo tortuga Cecilio se transforman en detectives privados de los años 40 para resolver el misterio. Sin embargo, deberán enfrentarse a oscuros poderes que no les harán fácil la tarea.

Dirigido por Francisco Visceral Rivera
Producido por Lucas Engel, Ignacio Socías
Director de arte y animación: Francisco Visceral Rivera
Productor ejecutivo: Juan Cifuentes Mera
Productor asociado: Niles Atallah
Animación: Francisco Visceral Rivera, Matías López
Edición: Juan Cifuentes Mera

La letra habla de la química entre dos personas que quieren dejar atrás las miradas y la multitud para vivir una conexión más íntima, con el estilo característico del reguetón de finales de los 2000.

snippet.title: Battlefield 6 Season 4 Naval Official Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Naval warfare has arrived, bringing all-out combat across land, air, and sea. 

Deploy to Tsuru Reef, our biggest battlefield yet, where sprawling islands, dynamic waves, boats, jets, helicopters, and ground vehicles collide in massive battles. Command the coastline with the RCB-90 Patrol Boat or race through the surf in the 7.7m NSW RHIB. 

Expand your arsenal with four new weapons, including the long-range Interdictor sniper rifle, then climb the ranks in a brand-new Ranked Battle Royale season packed with fresh rewards. And later in the season, Wake Island returns. 

Prepare to deploy when Season 4 launches on July 21.

#Battlefield6

🎥 Attention viewers! (ITS FAN MADE)
Marvel Studios just raised the bar with Spider-Man: Brand New Day, and this trailer breakdown covers every frame-by-frame detail fans need to see from the newest Spider-Man 2026 trailer release. Tom Holland swings back into the spotlight in what's shaping up to be Peter Parker's most emotional outing yet, with Zendaya and Sadie Sink rounding out a cast that's already sparking massive theories across the fandom. This deep dive explores how the new Spider-Man movie builds on the legacy of No Way Home while carving out its own identity as "Spider-Man: New Home" for a new era of storytelling. Packed with comics references, 4K trailer analysis, and everything upcoming for the web-slinger, this is the ultimate breakdown for anyone tracking Marvel's most talked-about release heading into 2026.

The inspiration behind this video:
Spider-Man: Brand New Day is the Marvel event that every fan has been waiting for and this Spider-Man Brand New Day Final Trailer just changed everything we thought we knew about the MCU's future! Tom Holland delivers his most emotionally powerful performance yet as Peter Parker navigates a world that has completely forgotten who he is after the soul-crushing events of Spider-Man: No Way Home, and this Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer in stunning 4K is already being called the greatest Marvel trailer of the entire trailer 2026 era. Zendaya returns with a role that will redefine her entire MCU journey, while Sadie Sink's entry into Spider-Man Marvel Studios universe has sent the comics community into an absolute frenzy that shows no signs of slowing down!

This Spider-Man 2026 Trailer takes everything that made the Spider-Man New Home Trailer era so emotionally powerful and cranks it up to a level that no upcoming Marvel movie has ever attempted before — making this new Spider-Man movie the most ambitious Peter Parker story ever committed to film. From the Spider-Man New Home callbacks woven throughout this Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer to the jaw-dropping new threats that suggest the entire MCU is about to be reshaped from the ground up, every single frame of this trailer 2025 to trailer 2026 journey has been building toward this one defining moment for Tom Holland's Spider-Man. The Spider-Man Marvel Studios machine is firing on all cylinders and this 4K concept trailer breakdown reveals every hidden Easter egg, comics connection, and secret detail that proves Spider-Man Brand New Day is built to be the greatest wall-crawler story ever told on the big screen!

snippet.title: DIGGER | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Digg. Or Die. DIGGER. Only in theaters October 2. #Diggermovie



Academy Award winner Tom Cruise stars in Academy Award-winning filmmaker Alejandro G. Iñárritu’s original film “Digger,” from Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures.
The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity’s savior before the disaster he’s unleashed destroys everything.
Cruise stars in the title role, alongside Oscar winner Riz Ahmed, John Goodman, Oscar nominee Sandra Hüller, Michael Stuhlbarg, and Oscar nominee Jesse Plemons.  Robert John Burke, Emma D’Arcy, Burn Gorman and Sophie Wilde also star. 
Iñárritu directed from a screenplay by Iñárritu & Oscar-winners Alexander Dinelaris & Nicolás Giacobone, and Sabina Berman, story by Iñárritu & Berman.  The film is produced by Iñárritu, Oscar nominee Mary Parent, Cruise and Michael Sharp, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Berman, Dinelaris, Giacobone, Jez Butterworth and Emmanuel Lubezki.
Joining Iñárritu behind the camera are previous collaborators Oscar-winning director of photography Emmanuel Lubezki; editors Conor O’Neill and Oscar winner Stephen Mirrone; Oscar-nominated costume designer Jacqueline West; Oscar-winning makeup and hair designer Alessandro Bertolazzi; and Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler; along with Oscar-winning production designer Dennis Gassner and production designer Richard Johnson, Oscar-winning prosthetic makeup designer Kazu Hiro, and composer Cosmo Sheldrake.
An Alejandro G. Iñárritu Film, “Digger” was shot entirely in VistaVision and will be released in theaters and IMAX® across North America on October 2, 2026, and internationally beginning 30 September 2026.  It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.description:

➤ Música para todos los moods: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL9XoSLEkeG4iQcziPT_p7ilJ5oK9f2_9V

https://youtu.be/u0ZrgOsPCEs?si=CPv2-XxkUHVUJxGl

📝 Letra / Lyrics 🎧:
Welcome to the official remix!
Na-na-naeh (Woh, oh)
Yandel "La Leyenda"
Na-na-naoh (Woh, oh)
Na-na-naeh
¡Farru!
Zion & Lennox
Na-na-naeh, eh-eh
Tus besos me enloquecen, eres única (Yo' man)

Ella tiene algo (Eh, eh, eh)
Algo especial (Woh, oh, oh)
No sé, no te lo puedo explicar, ah-ah
0:22 Ella tiene algo que me atrapa
Se me hace muy fácil extrañarla
Yo que no creo en el amor (Oh-oh)
En su juego redondito caí (Oh, oh, oh)
Y me enamoré (This is the remix!)

Ignora (Oh)
Sin tocarla me acalora
La veo bailar, no la dejo sola, sola
Quiero hacerla mi señora
Ella es encantadora y cazadora (Oh)
Sin tocarla me acalora (Oh)
La veo bailar, no la dejo sola-sola
Quiero hacerla mi señora
Ella es encantadora y cazadora (Woh, oh, oh, oh)

Na-na-naeh
Na-na-naoh
Na-na-naeh
Na-na-naeh, eh-eh
(Hey, yo' man; ¡Farru!)

Baby, tienes algo que me encanta
Tus ojos me atrapan
Ese olorcito tuyo es el que me mata
Quiero comerte de los pie' a la cabeza (Blep)
Tú no sabes lo mucho que tú me interesas (Yo' man)
Es que tú esta' tan rica, bebé (Bebé)
Que yo quiero empezar, pero por dónde no sé (Fire!)
Yo quiero besarte parte por parte
Quiero demostrarte que quiero amarte (Eh-eh)
Mientras estés conmigo yo voy a cuidarte
No te va a faltar nada, no hay de qué preocuparte, eh

1:42 Porque nadie no' está viendo aquí
Estamos sólitos aquí
Déjame sentir todo tu cuerpo
Porque nadie no' está viendo aquí
Estamos solo' y yo pa' ti
Déjame sentir todo tu cuerpo
Na, naeh
(This is the remix; ¡Farru!)

Na-na-naeh
Na-na-naoh
Na-na-naeh
Na-na-naeh, eh-eh

Ignora (Oh)
Sin tocarla me acalora
La veo bailar, no la dejo sola, sola
Quiero hacerla mi señora
Ella es encantadora y cazadora (Zion)
Sin tocarla me acalora
La veo bailar, no la dejo sola, sola
Quiero hacerla mi señora
Ella es encantadora y cazadora

Na-na-naeh
Na-na-naoh
Na-na-naeh
Na-na-naeh, eh-eh 

2:49 Cuando le digo que le llegue, me sorprende su manera
De pasar las horas, si la vieras
Entre ella y yo no existen limites
Mucho menos la timidez, solo noches pasajeras
No quiere dejar saber nunca lo que siente
Prefiere alejarse antes de envolverse, eh-eh-eh
No tienes que comprometerte (Eh)
Me conformo con tocarte (Zion, baby!)

Tú tienes la necesidad de que te vean (Ah-ah)
Conozco tu juego, mujer
Busco tu debilidad y no me dejas (Ah-ah-ah)
Eres un mal que me hace bien
Yo, necesito tu piel
No paro de pensarte, eh-eh
No dejo de buscarte, eh-eh
Tú solo-

Ignora
Sin tocarla me acalora
La veo bailar, no la dejo sola, sola
Quiero hacerla mi señora
Ella es encantadora y cazadora (Yo')

Na-na-naeh
Na-na-naoh (Z Diddy!)
Na-na-naeh
Na-na-naeh, eh-eh (Zion, baby, y Lennox!)
